deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd

logs.m: Confirmed fully closed and funded. Post-close action items still open.
Transaction officially closed and funded.
Cleared, funded, and closed.

Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo — family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo. Willing to cooperate.
Joyce sent lien bypass form. Chris managing transaction on behalf of estate.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money received. Steve finished clearing Apr 29 and sent photos. New prospect reached out May 9 interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: land-only cash deal, buyer does what they want after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect re: showing and intent. Post new clearing photos to social. Arrange drone footage for upgraded marketing.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show tomorrow — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her info and set expectations.
Clearing complete. Photos sent. First offer confirmed dead. Strategy confirmed: lead with net after close on any next offer.
Current offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve still clearing property. Key message: net after close is what matters.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Two contractor bids compared: HouzzPro/Matt Toney ($54,877) vs T&T/Kendall ($61,980). Bank connected directly with Matt Toney. Dumpsters dropped Saturday May 9. Chris on-site today May 11 to meet Matt Toney and project manager.
deals.next: On-site today with Matt Toney and PM. Monitor work progress. Establish listing timeline once rehab is underway.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and project manager on site. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in his office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler by phone. Goal: work starts by next Monday.
Full estimate comparison complete. HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Actively shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still being explored.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site. Police report also to be handled.
Shot video and photos of property. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Vacant 6 months, 208+ DOM, $528,999 list price. Market value $350K-$400K. Payoff ~$493K. Underwater $93K-$143K before selling costs. Sellers double-carrying Pearl Brewery apt + $2,843 mortgage. Three paths: short sale, VA loan assumption, or price reduction with cash to close.
deals.next: Check on property while in Devine today. Get showing feedback from May 5 showing. Resolve lawn care. Have path decision conversation with Matt and Chandler.

logs.m: Chris checking on property while in Devine. Still need showing agent feedback from May 5 showing. Grass still unresolved.
Dropping sign and lockbox at property when in Devine. Keep marketing.
Outside agent showing at 2pm. Lawn care: Morales Tree Trimming (830-444-7804) and A.M. Lawn Care (830-444-2436) both contacted for quotes.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Showing Monday May 4 at 2pm scheduled. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified and documented.
Gilberto buyers wishy-washy — seller finance likely dead. Need honest price adjustment conversation.
Pricing reality: biggest house in neighborhood, overpriced. Must have honest price adjustment conversation with sellers.
Showing at property — potential owner finance buyer. Using as leverage for pricing strategy conversation.

Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Debt paid off. 30-day wait for credit pull. Pre-approval target Feb 2026.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv — Analysis
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis for Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA pulled 31 comps — avg sale $207K, estimated value $266K. Being used to build branded property analysis template.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Numbers pulled and analyzed. Used as basis for building property analysis tool.
